Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Cristy Styer, Esq., (415-986-8122)for Referee Warren Wong
York Liu, Defendant, (415-753-1333) appearing on his own behalf without counsel of record Ross Madden.

Defendant York Liu raises the issue on fees. Court indicates that arguments on fees will not be heard in today's hearing. Motion on fees may be filed after the final report or close of escrow. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having adopts the tentative ruling as follows: OTHER WARREN WONG's Amended Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Confirm sale and to confirm broker's commission is GRANTED. Motion to approve referee in attorney fees is DENIED without prejudice to be re-filed after Final Report is made. See details in the scanned Order, signed in open court.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JAMES LIU, M.D.'s Motion For Order 1. That Property Be Sold And The Proceeds Be Divided Among The Parties In Accordance With Their Interests In The Property; 2. Appointing Referee; 3. Authorizing Referee To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement; 4. To Obtain Possession Of Real Property is ruled upon as follows:

1. That Property be Sold and the Proceeds Divided Among the Parties in Accordance with their Interests in the Property; 2. Appointing Referee; 3. Authorizing Referee to Enter into Exclusive Listing Agreement; 4. To Obtain Possession of Real Property is CONTINUED to April 23, 2015. Parties failed to provide the court with courtesy copies as required under Local Rule 2.6B. Courtesy copies of all papers filed in conjunction with the motion shall be filed by April 14, 2015, with Department 501 with the new hearing date reflected. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
